summary: Markets exhibit cautious optimism amid geopolitical tensions boosting commodities like Brent Crude and Gold, while crypto shows resilience with Bitcoin holding key supports and institutional inflows; forex pairs like EUR/USD remain neutral awaiting NFP data. Brent Crude leads bullish sentiment due to Hormuz risks, contrasting neutral-to-bearish pressures on precious metals from a stronger dollar.

signals.name: Bitcoin
signals.reason: DegenDave outlines a short setup on Bitcoin at a key price level expected to print profits.

signals.name: Top Altcoins
signals.reason: DegenDave highlights top altcoins not waiting for Bitcoin, suggesting independent upside momentum.

signals.name: Ethereum
signals.reason: Trading below 50-day EMA and 200-day MA resistance cluster at $2,320–$2,345 despite bullish fundamentals like high Binance buy ratio and record smart contracts.

signals.name: Gold

signals.name: Brent Crude Oil
signals.reason: Bullish above $103-$105 driven by deepening geopolitical supply shock in Hormuz, consolidating $105–$115 with resistance at $111-$114.
